modern_reader_context.market_surface_rule: Use manga-literate reader culture, tram/metro commute, bookshop shelves, school/campus life, gaming/anime fandom, and localized emotional restraint.
modern_reader_context.audience_story_rule: Treat games, school platforms, algorithmic recommendation, friendship chat, family device boundaries, and identity formation as ordinary life texture.
modern_reader_context.genre_relevance_rule: Modern school stories need social weather: group chats, seating maps, clubs, transit, class apps, lunches, phones, and private/public self.

catalyst.logline: A class group chat turns the seating chart into a popularity map, and the protagonist's one honest reply changes who moves their chair.

modern_reader_context.craft_directive: Fuse the genre engine with a contemporary reader-world entrypoint. Market=fr_FR; audience=gen_alpha. Use catalyst 'group_chat_seating_map': A class group chat turns the seating chart into a popularity map, and the protagonist's one honest reply changes who moves their chair. Transmutation: Chat status becomes belonging pressure. Market surface: Use manga-literate reader culture, tram/metro commute, bookshop shelves, school/campus life, gaming/anime fandom, and localized emotional restraint. Audience rule: Treat games, school platforms, algorithmic recommendation, friendship chat, family device boundaries, and identity formation as ordinary life texture. Use concrete objects and social pressure on page one; do not name-drop trends.
